title: Punjab Heritage & Pride
shortDescription: Golden Temple spirituality, Wagah Border patriotism, and vibrant culture.
overview: Soak in the spiritual peace of the Golden Temple and feel the patriotic fervor at the Wagah Border. Explore the modern planned city of Chandigarh.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Amritsar
itinerary.description: Visit the Golden Temple in the evening.

itinerary.title: Amritsar History
itinerary.description: Jallianwala Bagh and Wagah Border ceremony.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Chandigarh
itinerary.description: Drive to Chandigarh, visit Rock Garden and Sukhna Lake.
